category_sources: Official GitHub wiki describes Geogram as a programming library with geometry-processing and Delaunay/Voronoi algorithms
source_facts.description says it is a programming library of geometric algorithms
display_name_sources: Official GitHub wiki heading is Geogram documentation
docs_sources: Official GitHub wiki is the project documentation surface and includes mini-tutorials
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/BrunoLevy/geogram, so repo is returned as null per instruction
tags_sources: Official GitHub wiki describes mesh processing, reconstruction, parameterization, remeshing, boolean operations, Delaunay, and Voronoi features
